steps.name: precheck-operator
steps.plan: 确认 WoodpeckerCluster CRD（woodpeckerclusters.woodpecker.zilliz.io）已注册（operator 就位）

steps.name: apply-cr
steps.plan:
将 apply：
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: e2e-wp-config
  namespace: mb-e2e
data:
  woodpecker.yaml: "woodpecker:
  meta:
    type: etcd
  client:
    quorum:
\
    \      quorumBufferPools:
      - name: default-region-pool
        seeds:
\
    \        - e2e-wp-server-0.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
        -\
    \ e2e-wp-server-1.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
        - e2e-wp-server-2.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
\
    \      quorumSelectStrategy:
        affinityMode: soft
        replicas: 3
\
    \        strategy: random
  storage:
    type: service
    rootPath: /woodpecker/data
\
    log:
  level: info
  format: json
  stdout: true
etcd:
  endpoints:
  -\
    \ e2e-etcd.mb-e2e.svc:2379
  rootPath: by-dev
minio:
  address: minio.mb-e2e.svc
\
    \  port: 80
  accessKeyID: minioadmin
  secretAccessKey: minioadmin
  bucketName:\
    \ woodpecker
  rootPath: files
"
---
apiVersion: woodpecker.zilliz.io/v1alpha1
kind: WoodpeckerCluster
metadata:
  name: e2e-wp
  namespace: mb-e2e
spec:
  image: milvusdb/woodpecker:latest
  replicas: 3
  storageSize: 10Gi
  servicePort: 18080
  gossipPort: 17946
  metricsPort: 9091
  configRef:
    name: e2e-wp-config

steps.name: register
steps.plan: 写管理元数据 + 快照，标记 Managed
steps.detail: 已登记实例 e2e-wp 为 Managed
